task: Four labelled lists are given. Which list has the largest sum? a: [75, 39, 33, 21, 62, 71, 94, 30, 62, 20, 13, 95]  b: [71, 41, 84, 14, 10, 61, 99, 48, 97, 49, 44, 98, 65, 47, 19]  c: [89, 8, 82, 30, 61, 8, 60, 13, 21, 33]  d: [10, 3, 98, 90, 39, 2, 96, 52, 87, 44, 54].
